name: Mantle
action: Publish your best onchain research and earn up to $1,000 in MNT tokens
description: Mantle is rewarding users who publish quality onchain research with up to $1,000 in MNT tokens.

name: Hyperliquid
action: Trade, interact with chain, stake HYPE, provide LP and refer friends
description: Hyperliquid continues its reward program for active traders and liquidity providers.

name: Aether
action: Complete social tasks and refer friends to qualify for $250 giveaway

name: Base
action: Complete onchain tasks, social quests, and download the app to earn points
description: Base rewards active users with points convertible to tokens.

name: Zerion
action: Make swaps, complete daily quests and refer friends
description: Zerion rewards power users across multiple blockchains.

name: Ethena
action: Hold sENA tokens and use USDe in DeFi integrations
description: Ethena distributes rewards to sENA holders and USDe users.

name: Polymarket
action: Deposit funds and make market predictions on Polymarket
description: Polymarket prediction market rewards active traders.

name: Ink Chain
action: Trade on Kraken Pro and interact with Dapps on Ink Chain
description: Ink Chain rewards users who actively trade and interact with its ecosystem.

name: Uponly
action: Join testnet and trade in pump mode to earn future rewards
description: Uponly testnet participants earn allocation in the upcoming token launch.

name: Soneium
action: Engage in on-chain activities to earn Soneium points
description: Sony-backed Soneium rewards early ecosystem participants.

name: Bybit
action: Place sports predictions and hold position to win rewards
description: Bybit's prediction event rewards winners with crypto prizes.
